questions.question: Consider the following Context-Free Grammar: S → NP VP | NP VP NP. What is the purpose of S in this grammar and what does it represent in the syntactic structure of a sentence?
Given a context-free grammar G = (V, Σ, P, S) and a sentence w ∈ Σ*, describe the top-down parsing approach and explain how it differs from bottom-up parsing.
Consider the CYK parsing algorithm. What is the main advantage of using CYK parsing and how does it compare to other parsing algorithms?
